name: GET /api/notifications/_status - notification-service readiness + subscription state
description: Operator-readable status route. Reports whether the lead.created subscriber is wired up (depends on EVENT_BUS_REDIS_URL being set) and whether the email transport is in log-only mode (Phase-1 default). Phase-1 leaves no auth on this route — the BFF restricts access.

testCases.name: Service reports ready with subscription state
